_comment: ADK / agents-cli eval config. LLM-as-judge criteria for the drift trajectories. Validate exact field names against the pinned agents-cli (`agents-cli eval run`) — the onboarding guide references this file but does not specify its full schema.

criteria.name: classification_correctness
criteria.description: The agent's change_type matches the expected type for the trajectory (RENAME / TYPE_PROMOTION / REORDER / NEW_FIELD / DEPRECATION). RENAME must not be confused with DEPRECATION+NEW_FIELD.

criteria.name: remediation_safety
criteria.description: Proposed remediation preserves the downstream contract (VIEW shim / CAST), is non-destructive, and never proposes resync/reload as a first option.

criteria.name: human_in_the_loop
criteria.description: Under STRICT autonomy, remediation_status is PROPOSED (not auto-applied). Approval is requested before any write.

criteria.name: no_false_drift
criteria.description: A snapshot differing only by _fivetran_* system columns yields zero drift events (system-column exclusion + hash gate hold).
